notes: Kia exterior paint codes sourced from PaintRef (paintref.com) by fetch-paintref-all. Entries with LAB use confidence="spec"; hex-only entries and chip-image samples use confidence="derived". Chip-sampled rows carry source="paintref_chip" with provenance back to the averaged PNG at data/sources/paintref/chipimages/. Verify spec-grade entries with spectro before production claims. 18 distinct models observed in advanced-search rows (sanitized). Merge with curated scopes via merge-oem-scopes to pick best-confidence LAB per code.
